name: Joseph Cyriac
notes: Lead gen for construction staffing. Revised to $900/mo managed, reduced volume, no minimum contract.

timeline.event: Discovery call — lead gen for construction staffing, bootstrapping, price-sensitive
Follow-up email sent + requirement analysis completed
Sales script, pitch deck, and proposal generated — $3,500 one-time / $1,500/mo managed
Joseph came back — negotiated down to $900/mo managed, reduced volume (100 LinkedIn/week, 50 DMs/week, 200 cold emails/week), no minimum contract
Revised proposal sent at $900/mo with reduced scope, month-to-month with advance payment

current_status: Revised proposal sent at $900/mo with reduced scope. Waiting for Joseph's final decision. He's bootstrapping and funding tools out of pocket — likely needs time to commit.
